content.title: Affordable for Everyone
content.description: Start your gold journey with as little as Rs.11 on ABCD.

content.title: Automate Your Wealth
content.description: Set monthly SIPs and grow your gold effortlessly.

content.title: Buy or Sell Anytime
content.description: Buy, sell, or gift gold anytime—no hidden fees, no delays.

content.question: Who can participate in the Digital Gold program?
content.answer: The Digital Gold program is open to all Indian residents with a valid PAN card. You can start investing with as little as Rs.10 through the ABCD app.

content.question: How can I buy Digital Gold?
content.answer: You can buy Digital Gold through the ABCD app. Simply download the app, complete KYC, and start investing in 24K pure gold backed by MMTC-PAMP.

content.question: What happens after I buy Digital Gold?
content.answer: After purchase, your gold is stored in secure MMTC-PAMP vaults. You can track your holdings in real-time, sell for cash, or request physical delivery anytime.

content.question: Is Digital Gold safe?
content.answer: Yes, Digital Gold is 100% safe. It is backed by physical gold stored in MMTC-PAMP insured vaults with full transparency and BIS certification.

steps.text: Download the ABCD App and register yourself
Go to invest section and click on digi-gold tile
Choose or enter the amount you want to invest to buy Digital Gold
Complete the payment and track your investment in the ABCD App
Choose your Digital Gold SIP as low as Rs 50 per week
Enter information and authenticate the details
Add recipient details and send your gift with a note.
Confirm the details and complete the payment
Login to ABCD App and select "Gift Digital Gold"
Enter Gift information and authenticate the details
Add recipient details and send your gift with a note.
Confirm the details and complete the payment
Choose the amount or quantity of Digital Gold you want to sell
Confirm the chosen value for sale with the live price
Provide your bank details where your sale proceeds will be credited
Approve the sale and the amount would be credited to your bank account
Choose the option of the Products against which you want to redeem
Confirm redemption to continue your investment.
Pay the making charges for your selected product.
Get your gold delivered after payment confirmation.
